name: llm_tokenization
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration on a pure dark background (#1A1A2E). Flat vector style with soft gradients. Limited color palette: electric blue (#7AB8F5), teal (#2EC4B6), amber (#F39C12), white (#FFFFFF). Clean geometric shapes, no text, no watermarks, no photorealism. Ample negative space. Professional and modern aesthetic, suitable for tech conference projection. A sentence represented as a continuous electric blue ribbon being cut by teal scissors into smaller segments. Each segment becomes a separate glowing tile. Represents text being split into tokens. No text, no letters, no words, no labels, no watermarks. 2:3 portrait aspect ratio. Dark background #1A1A2E.
